fields.title: Slang 101: Everyday Basics
fields.instructions_text: Listen to the pronunciation and try to write down your own sentence using one of the new words!

fields.definition_or_content: To suddenly stop contacting someone without explanation.
fields.example: I thought we had a great date, but she decided to ghost me.

fields.definition_or_content: Being upset, angry, or bitter about something minor.
fields.example: He is still salty because he lost the video game match.

fields.title: Expressions of Approval
fields.instructions_text: Find a situation where you would use these words to compliment a friend.

fields.example: Many people believe that Michael Jordan is the goat of basketball.
Have you heard his new album? The beats are absolute fire.

fields.title: Work and Hustle
fields.instructions_text: Read the card and repeat the example sentence out loud.

fields.definition_or_content: Physical or mental collapse caused by overwork or stress.
fields.example: Working twelve hours a day without a break will quickly lead to burnout.

fields.title: Socializing and Plans
fields.instructions_text: Think of a time when someone did this to you.

fields.definition_or_content: A person who is unreliable and cancels plans at the last minute.
fields.example: Don't count on him to show up; he is a total flake.

fields.title: Feelings and Drama
fields.instructions_text: Listen closely to the audio and practice your British or American accent!

fields.example: Sit down with me and tell me all the recent tea about them.

fields.title: Money and Wealth
fields.instructions_text: How would you translate this concept into your native slang?

fields.definition_or_content: To show off your achievements, skills, or physical appearance.
fields.example: Buying that expensive watch was just a massive flex.

fields.title: Trust and Relationships
fields.instructions_text: Complete the interactive quiz at the bottom of the page to test your focus.

fields.example: I don't trust that website; their refund policy seems very shady.

fields.title: Modern Idioms
fields.instructions_text: Use the audio button to hear the phrase in context.

fields.definition_or_content: To get something over with because it is inevitable.
fields.example: I hate going to the dentist, but I just need to bite the bullet and go.

fields.title: Daily Reactions
fields.instructions_text: Try to guess the missing word in the context challenge!

fields.definition_or_content: Seriously, no lie, or telling the absolute truth.
fields.example: That was the best burger I have ever eaten in my life, no cap.

fields.title: Time and Urgency
fields.instructions_text: Listen to the full example and practice the correct sentence rhythm.

fields.example: Don't worry about the drive; we will get there in no time.
